name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement

labels: enhancement

## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? What are you trying to do that the current code doesn't support? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe the feature or change you'd like to see. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Any other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short. -->

## Context

- Which area does this touch? <!-- scanner / executor / venue adapter / dashboard / docs / other -->
- Does this require exchange API changes?
- Is there prior discussion or a related issue/PR?

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] This is not a security issue (security issues → SECURITY.md)
